title: uva-ursi × media
intro: Uva-ursi × media, a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Uva-ursi (Arctostaphylos uva-ursi) and Ledum palustre (Ledum palustre), is also known as Arctostaphylos × media. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Uva-ursi × media include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, alleviate symptoms of cystitis, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Uva-ursi × media can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
